title: Iron Mountain: Don't Buy Now
text: Iron Mountain is well-positioned for a recession or economic downturn. The company will likely start to increase its dividend soon.

title: Iron Mountain Incorporated Announces Tax Treatment of 2022 Distributions
text: BOSTON--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE: IRM), a global leader in innovative storage, data center infrastructure, asset lifecycle management and information management services, today announced the tax treatment for all 2022 distributions on its common stock.

title: Iron Mountain Appoints Mithu Bhargava as Executive Vice President and General Manager for Digital Solutions
text: BOSTON--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Iron Mountain (NYSE: IRM), the global leader in innovative storage, data center infrastructure, asset lifecycle management and information management services, announced that Mithu Bhargava has joined the company as Executive Vice President and General Manager for digital solutions. As a core member of the Executive Leadership Team, she will report to CEO, William Meaney and oversee the innovation, execution, and growth of Iron Mountain's digital products, solutions and go-to-market strategy.

title: Iron Mountain: Prepare For A $45~$55 Holding Range
text: I am seeing multiple headwinds to keep Iron Mountain's earnings growth muted in the near term. Combined with a relative expensive valuation multiple, I anticipate its stock price to be trapped in a $45~$55 consolidation window in the next few years.
